positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a whimsical celestial animal—a crescent moon fox—perched atop a detailed constellation map. The fox has a glowing, bioluminescent fur texture and emits soft, warm cyan and golden light. The background deep space is rendered with subtle gradient transitions of midnight blue and deep violet, contrasting sharply with sharp, glowing star patterns and nebula swirls. Clean, graphic lines define the celestial elements, emphasizing negative space and symmetry. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau organic flow and modern vector art, perfect for a high-contrast, single-color-reversal-friendly t-shirt print. Cinematic, high detail, 8K, centered composition, flat graphic aesthetic, sticker sheet ready.
